title: Weather forecast for George
description: GEORGE NEWS - No weather warnings have been...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - No weather warnings have been received for the latter part of this week so far, only pleasant weather.

In its weather forecast for George, the South African Weather Service forecasts that the weather will be clear to partly cloudy for the first week in August.

There is a small chance of light rain on Sunday.


> George data for August:


- Long term average rainfall: 67mm
- Rainfall for July: 64.4mm
- Long term average max temp: 18.5°C
- Long term average min temp: 7.4°C


> Your weather from Thursday:
